"CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary
Discord Slash Commands Bypass Group DM Channel Allowlist

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: narrow
- Normalized severity: moderate
- Assessment: v2026.3.28 native Discord slash and autocomplete paths still skip the group-DM allowlist, but impact is limited to already-authorized Discord users bypassing a channel restriction rather than crossing a stronger trust boundary.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `8fdb19676ab44cf85d47ee13c578195f2e527591` — 2026-03-30T11:17:36-06:00

OpenClaw thanks @nexrin for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00177, "percentile": 0.07364}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T03:23:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41348"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-03T03:23:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/8fdb19676ab44cf85d47ee13c578195f2e527591", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41348", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-group-dm-channel-allowlist-bypass-via-discord-slash-commands", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Discord Slash Commands Bypass Group DM Channel Allowlist", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:25:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvvf-6vh3-9j43", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
